name: help-scout-mcp-server
description: Connect Claude and other AI assistants to Help Scout read-only API parity: conversations, customers, organizations, reports, metadata, and Docs.
long_description:
Connect your AI assistant to Help Scout for read-only support investigation and account-level analysis.

**Read API parity:**
• Search and inspect conversations, summaries, full threads, attachments, and original source
• Browse customers, customer contact channels, organizations, and organization conversations
• Pull reports for company, conversations, Docs, channels, productivity, happiness, users, and ratings
• Inspect metadata for inboxes, custom fields, folders, routing, tags, users, teams, system users, saved replies, workflows, and webhooks
• Search and retrieve Help Scout Docs sites, collections, categories, articles, revisions, related articles, and redirects

**Security:**
• OAuth2 Client Credentials authentication
• Optional message content redaction
• Built-in caching and rate-limit handling
• No write tools are included in this release

app_id.title: Help Scout App ID
app_id.description: Your App ID from Help Scout My Apps

app_secret.title: Help Scout App Secret
app_secret.description: Your App Secret from Help Scout My Apps

default_inbox_id.title: Default Inbox ID (Optional)
default_inbox_id.description: Default inbox for scoped searches - improves LLM context. Inbox IDs are auto-discovered on connect. Leave empty to search all inboxes.

docs_api_key.title: Docs API Key (Optional)
docs_api_key.description: Help Scout Docs API key for knowledge base tools

docs_base_url.title: Docs API Base URL
docs_base_url.description: Help Scout Docs API v1 base URL

redact_message_content.title: Redact Message Content
redact_message_content.description: Replace message bodies with placeholders in responses

cache_ttl.title: Cache TTL (seconds)
cache_ttl.description: How long to cache API responses

tools.name: searchConversations
tools.description: Search Help Scout conversations with various filters including full-text content search

tools.name: getConversation
tools.description: Get the raw Help Scout conversation object by ID with optional embedded threads; set includeSystemActors to preserve user/team/system_user person types

tools.name: getConversationSummary
tools.description: Get conversation summary with first customer message and latest staff reply

tools.name: getThreads
tools.description: Retrieve all thread messages for a conversation; set includeSystemActors to preserve user/team/system_user person types

tools.name: getServerTime
tools.description: Get current server time for date-relative queries

tools.name: listAllInboxes
tools.description: List all accessible inboxes with their IDs; pass nameContains to filter by case-insensitive name substring

tools.name: getInbox
tools.description: Get one Help Scout inbox by ID; pass include for custom fields, folders, and routing

tools.name: getCustomer
tools.description: Get a customer profile by ID with embedded contact details and address lookup

tools.name: listCustomers
tools.description: List customers by name, query, or dates; defaults to v2 page pagination, set useV3 or pass a cursor for the v3 Customers API with cursor pagination and email/createdSince filters

tools.name: searchCustomersByEmail
tools.description: Search customers by email address using the cursor-based v3 Customers API

tools.name: getCustomerContacts
tools.description: Fetch customer contact sub-resources including emails, phones, chats, websites, social profiles, and address

tools.name: getOrganization
tools.description: Get an organization profile by ID with optional counts and properties

tools.name: listOrganizations
tools.description: List organizations with Help Scout's supported sort modes

tools.name: getOrganizationMembers
tools.description: List customers associated with an organization

tools.name: getOrganizationConversations
tools.description: List conversations associated with an organization

tools.name: listCustomerProperties
tools.description: List customer property definitions with slugs, types, and dropdown options

tools.name: listOrganizationProperties
tools.description: List organization property definitions with slugs, types, and dropdown options

tools.name: getOrganizationProperty
tools.description: Get an organization property definition by slug

tools.name: listTags
tools.description: List Help Scout tags with IDs, exact names, and ticket counts

tools.name: getTag
tools.description: Get a Help Scout tag by ID

tools.name: listUsers
tools.description: List Help Scout users with optional exact email or inbox filtering; includeStatuses attaches availability, includeSystemActors lists v3 system users

tools.name: getUser
tools.description: Get a Help Scout user by ID or the authenticated resource owner; includeStatus attaches availability, includeSystemActors fetches the v3 system-user record

tools.name: listTeams
tools.description: List Help Scout teams with IDs for member lookup and reporting

tools.name: getTeamMembers
tools.description: List users who belong to a Help Scout team

tools.name: listSavedReplies
tools.description: List saved replies for a Help Scout inbox

tools.name: getSavedReply
tools.description: Get one saved reply for a Help Scout inbox

tools.name: getOriginalSource
tools.description: Get the original source for a conversation thread (format: json default, or rfc822 raw email).

tools.name: getAttachment
tools.description: Get base64-encoded Help Scout attachment data

tools.name: downloadAttachmentFile
tools.description: Download a Help Scout attachment file as base64 with response metadata

tools.name: listWorkflows
tools.description: List Help Scout workflows

tools.name: listWebhooks
tools.description: List Help Scout webhooks

tools.name: getWebhook
tools.description: Get a Help Scout webhook by ID

tools.name: getSatisfactionRating
tools.description: Get a Help Scout satisfaction rating by ID

tools.name: getCompanyReport
tools.description: Get a Help Scout company report (overall, customers-helped, or drilldown)

tools.name: getConversationsReport
tools.description: Get a Help Scout conversations report (overall, volume-by-channel, busy-times, drilldown, fields-drilldown, new, new-drilldown, received-messages)

tools.name: getProductivityReport
tools.description: Get a Help Scout productivity report (overall, first-response-time, replies-sent, resolved, response-time, resolution-time)

tools.name: getUserReport
tools.description: Get a Help Scout user or team report (overall, conversation-history, customers-helped, drilldown, happiness, ratings, replies, resolutions, chat)

tools.name: getHappinessReport
tools.description: Get a Help Scout happiness report (overall or ratings)

tools.name: getChannelReport
tools.description: Get a Help Scout channel report (chat, email, or phone)

tools.name: getDocsReport
tools.description: Get the Help Scout Docs overall report

tools.name: listDocsSites
tools.description: List Help Scout Docs sites

tools.name: getDocsSite
tools.description: Get a Help Scout Docs site by ID; includeRestrictions attaches restricted-site settings with secrets redacted

tools.name: listDocsCollections
tools.description: List Help Scout Docs collections

tools.name: getDocsCollection
tools.description: Get a Help Scout Docs collection by ID or number

tools.name: listDocsCategories
tools.description: List Help Scout Docs categories for a collection

tools.name: getDocsCategory
tools.description: Get a Help Scout Docs category by ID or number

tools.name: listDocsArticles
tools.description: List Help Scout Docs articles for a collection or category

tools.name: searchDocsArticles
tools.description: Search Help Scout Docs articles

tools.name: getDocsArticle
tools.description: Get a Help Scout Docs article by ID or number

tools.name: listDocsRelatedArticles
tools.description: List related Help Scout Docs articles

tools.name: listDocsArticleRevisions
tools.description: List revisions for a Help Scout Docs article

tools.name: getDocsArticleRevision
tools.description: Get a Help Scout Docs article revision by ID

tools.name: listDocsRedirects
tools.description: List Help Scout Docs redirects for a site

tools.name: getDocsRedirect
tools.description: Get a Help Scout Docs redirect by ID

tools.name: findDocsRedirect
tools.description: Resolve a Help Scout Docs redirect target

prompts.name: search-last-7-days
prompts.description: Find recent conversations from the last 7 days
prompts.text:
To search for conversations from the last 7 days:
1. Use getServerTime tool to get current timestamp
2. Calculate date 7 days ago
3. Use searchConversations with createdAfter parameter
4. Optionally get details with getConversationSummary or getThreads

prompts.name: find-urgent-tags
prompts.text:
To find urgent conversations:
1. Use getServerTime tool
2. Search for conversations with tags like 'urgent', 'priority', 'high-priority', 'critical'
3. Use searchConversations tool with tag parameter
4. Consider using getConversationSummary for quick assessment

prompts.name: list-inbox-activity
prompts.text:
To monitor inbox activity:
1. Use getServerTime tool
2. Calculate timestamp N hours ago
3. Use searchConversations with inboxId and createdAfter
4. Analyze results for activity patterns and status breakdown
